expectations.text: At least 2 new focused functions were extracted from applyTransform
expectations.evidence: 3 new functions: applyRotation, applyTranslation, isZeroVec3. Plus ManifoldSolid type alias.

expectations.text: pnpm typecheck passes after the refactoring
pnpm test passes after the refactoring
expectations.evidence: Verification table: engine 37/37 pass (33 original + 4 new).

expectations.text: Report contains diff blocks for changed files
expectations.evidence: Full diff block for transform.ts showing exact before/after. Test file diff summarized.

expectations.text: Each extraction has a specific rationale explaining why
expectations.evidence: Rationale for transform.ts: 'mixed three concerns: zero-vector guarding, rotation, and translation'. Rationale for tests: 'verify the extracted functions... confirm the WASM memory optimization'.

expectations.text: Report shows max function length decreased
expectations.evidence: Complexity Delta: Max function length 22 lines -> 10 lines (-12). Cyclomatic complexity 5 -> 2 branches.

expectations.text: Report includes a dead code check section
expectations.evidence: Dead Code section: 'No dead code introduced. The original inline zero-checks... were replaced by calls to the extracted functions.'
